title: Vivi Faces Her Choice
description: On pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part focuses on vivi speaks to her country. Vivi stands before Alabasta and chooses her duty as princess, even as her heart remains tied to the friends who saved her.
scene: This scene belongs to the Vivi Speaks to Her Country sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Vivi, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You won't die on us, right...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: You know... Toto said about Yuba that...

dialogue.speaker: Smoker
dialogue.text: How long will your stubborn-ness last, father!?

summary: Vivi stands before Alabasta and chooses her duty as princess, even as her heart remains tied to the friends who saved her.
